_meta.note: Daemon-backed file watch stop. watch_id uses the job id wire prefix returned by file_watch_start; success returns final counters only.

unknown_watch_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [UnknownWatch]: watch id 'job_018f0000000000000000000000000002' is not live

invariants: watch_id is required and uses the job id wire prefix
success payload reports watch_id, bucket_id, frames_total, events_emitted, and bytes_total only
success payload has no probe_id, path, cursor, stopped flag, file content, or event bodies
stopping an unknown watch is a typed UnknownWatch error, not idempotent success
